screens.layout_notes: Full-page light gray (#e9eaeb) canvas with two stacked white rounded data-cards (Account Details, Products). Left nav is in EXPANDED state (~218px) with light separator lines under IES/SafeSend sub-groups. Header is the tall navy variant (~110px). Products section uses nested outlined sub-cards with all-caps gray metric labels. Consistent Symphony chrome era.

Rendered at a NARROWER/compact viewport (~778px wide) so left nav is collapsed-to-narrow (~110px, icon+label small), header is short (~58px). Single white card holds a dense table with per-row kebab menus. Identical content to the wider Admins capture but at different zoom/density — useful for detecting responsive divergence.

Same Admins screen and same narrow viewport as the (1) duplicate — short header (~58px), narrow nav (~110px). Table of full name + email with kebab row actions, 'Found 23 matches' footer count. Blue 'Add Admin' button top-right in header.

Narrow viewport (~778px). Marketing splash on pale blue (#eaf1f9) background — large display heading, orange 'COMING SOON!' eyebrow, product screenshot collage on the right, solid blue 'Learn More' CTA. Different visual era from the data screens: promotional layout, no card chrome, oversized typography.

Rendered very small/zoomed-out (~390px). Light-blue framed dashboard panel containing: a centered SafeSend avatar chip, a Sankey/flow chart ('Email Action Journey') with a big '333 Total Emails' KPI, a combo bar+line chart ('Emails vs Actions') with a legend, two list panels ('Top Modifications', 'Top Warned Users'), and a bottom 'Complete Your Security Suite' upsell card with a purple 'Configure' button. Visually the most chart-heavy / distinct design era — pastel gradient panel, multi-color charts, rounded inner cards.

Narrow viewport (~778px). Nav shows a DIFFERENT product set (SafeSend + EDR expanded, IES locked) and a DIFFERENT breadcrumb tenant (Gus Endpoint Distributor) — this account has no dashboard data, so Overview renders only the 'Complete Your Security Suite' empty/upsell state. Two side-by-side product promo cards: SafeSend (pale pink dotted, purple 'Configure') and Integrated Email Security (dark navy gradient, white 'Start a Free Trial'). The two cards are styled inconsistently with each other.

Wide viewport, expanded nav (~218px), tall navy header. Single white card form: read-only Email/Role text, two text inputs (First/Last Name, gray-filled), one native-style select (Time Zone), a disabled gray 'Save' button, and two muted slate secondary buttons (Change Two-Factor Authentication, Change Password) separated by hairline dividers. Standard Symphony form era.

Wide viewport, expanded nav, tall navy header with blue 'Add Role' CTA. Single white card with a 4-column access-matrix table (Role Name / Symphony / IES / SafeSend). Pill 'Default' badges next to system roles; trash-icon row action only on custom rows. 'Found 5 matches' footer. Tinted gray-blue header row, no row striping.

Narrow viewport (~778px). Single white card with explanatory paragraph, a slate 'Configure SAML' button with gear icon, and a large decorative blue line-art security illustration on the right. Empty/intro state styling.

tokens.font_family_guess: Rubik (or similar geometric sans); nav/headings use a heavier condensed weight, body is regular sans-serif
tokens.spacing_notes: Cards use ~24-32px internal padding on wide screens. Nav item rows ~40-44px tall. All-caps micro-labels (12px) with ~8px gap above values are a recurring form/data pattern. Two header heights observed (~110px tall on wide renders, ~58px on narrow renders) and two nav widths (~218px expanded, ~110px narrow), indicating the shared chrome scales/responds inconsistently across captures. Promo/marketing surfaces (overview upsell, EDR, SAML) use larger type and rounded pill buttons that diverge from the squared 6px primary buttons in the admin tables.
